name: Martz Trailways
fmcsa_address: 239 Old River Road, Wilkes Barre, PA 18702
inc_date: 1922 (founded); incorporated as Frank Martz Coach Company c.1927
officers: unknown (5th-generation Martz family ownership; Scott Henry is current CEO of Martz Group)
registry_source: PA Dept of State (not directly accessed); Wikipedia and Martz history corroborate active operation
notes: Input address 19723 Leitersburg Pike, Hagerstown MD does NOT match Frank Martz Coach Co. (Wilkes-Barre, PA). The Hagerstown address belongs to Atlantic Coast Trailways/Atlantic Coast Charters Inc (USDOT 252335; physical addr 1344C W Nursery Rd, Linthicum, MD 21090; 22 PU, 46 drivers, Satisfactory) which is family-owned by the Dillon family (acquired 2010), NOT a Martz subsidiary. The Martz Trailways brand maps to Frank Martz Coach Company (USDOT 38186), part of Trailways Transportation System. Likely input-data error conflating Atlantic Coast Trailways (a Trailways member at the Hagerstown address) with Martz Trailways (a separate Trailways member in PA). Reporting the Martz/Wilkes-Barre USDOT 38186 as the primary match for the brand name; alternative match Atlantic Coast Charters Inc USDOT 252335.
